---
title: "Digital Data Collection Tools: Getting Started on Google Forms"
subtitle: "Using Google Forms for data collection and management"
date: 2024-08-25
---

### Schedule

| Time | Activity | Facilitator |
| ---- | -------- | ----------- |
| 8:00 - 8:20 AM | Opening Remarks and Training Launch | Bernard Bett |
| 8:25 - 10:00 AM | Pre-training Survey | Anthony Waititu |
| | Understanding data and its importance | |
| | Principles of good data collection | |
| | Methods of data collection | |
| | Tools for data collection | |
| | Data management concepts | |
| | Data quality management | |
| | Data security and ethics | |
| 4:00 - 5:00 PM | Practicals on data collection and ethics | Mentors |


### Materials 

[Download zip](/materials/workshop_1/day-2/day_2.zip){.btn .btn-secondary}

### Reference Document

<iframe src="/materials/workshop_1/day-2/Data%20Collection%20and%20Ethics%20Slides.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](/materials/workshop_1/day-2/Data%20Collection%20and%20Ethics%20Slides.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}


### Quiz
- Follow the link to complete the quiz
[Data Collection and Ethics Quiz](https://forms.gle/bvPuAryFnt3HowMFA)


### Assignment
- Follow the link to find the assignment
[Google Form Assignment](/materials/workshop_1/day-2/Google%20Form%20Assignment.pdf)


### Video Recordings

#### Session 1
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}


#### Session 2
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}
